inputs.description: Synthetic AI/cyber/control readiness packet with policies, frameworks, evidence, and audit findings.

policies.name: AI Governance Policy
policies.text:
# AI Governance Policy
High-risk AI systems require model inventory, owner approval, human review, monitoring, incident response, and retained evidence.

policies.name: Cloud Security Standard
policies.text:
# Cloud Security Standard
Production workloads require privileged access review, encryption, logging, vendor due diligence, and change approval.

control_framework.requirement: Document human review and escalation controls
Review privileged access at least quarterly
Retain vendor security and privacy evidence

audit_findings: No retained evidence for human escalation testing.
Privileged access review is older than the quarterly target.
payload.system_architecture: User request -> claims assistant -> retrieval service -> policy engine -> human adjuster queue -> audit log.

llm.agent_role: AI, cyber, and control readiness agent
responsibilities: identify missing controls and weak evidence

metadata.customizable_for: AI governance, cyber readiness, cloud change assurance, ERP controls, RMF/ATO preparation, and operational control advisory.
metadata.problem_solved: Regulated companies need to prove that AI, cyber, cloud, ERP, or operational changes are safe, compliant, auditable, and controlled.
metadata.target_users: Financial services, healthcare, aerospace, defense, public sector contractors, enterprise AI, and cybersecurity teams.

outputs.artifact_contract: Compliance gap report with control matrix, risk register, remediation plan, audit evidence package, and executive risk summary.

inline_json.description: Load overrides from an inline JSON object.

input_file.description: Load JSON overrides from a local file path.

simulation.type: Risk, compliance, and control readiness workflow.
